params.name: The Nutcracker
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Lee Gi-na]] - [[Rare Rent]]
params.description:
On Nov 7, 1892, musician Tchaikovsky's The Nutcracker was performed hundreds of times in St. Petersburg.

Musician Tchaikovsky spent nine months adapting "The Nutcracker and the Mouse King" into a ballet. This is a special piece that uses string instruments to add an element of realism. The figure skating and acrobatics on ice are the most prominent features of the show. The audience can enjoy the elegance of ballet and the visual and musical beauty.

[Descriptions]
